composio_raw.name: Airtable
composio_raw.description: Airtable merges spreadsheet functionality with database power, enabling teams to organize projects, track tasks, and collaborate through customizable views, automation, and integrations for data management

llm_raw.description: A low-code platform that combines the features of a database and a spreadsheet for flexible project management and data organization.
llm_raw.notes: While the provided fetch page was empty due to browser detection, Airtable has a robust, publicly documented REST API used extensively in agentic tooling.
